heroes.name: Aamon
heroes.title: Duke of Shards
heroes.description: Aamon is a burst assassin who uses camouflage and shard attacks to eliminate isolated enemies.

heroes.name: Hayabusa
heroes.title: Crimson Shadow
heroes.description: Hayabusa is an isolation assassin designed to mark one target, eliminate them quickly, and escape before the enemy team can respond.

heroes.name: Gusion
heroes.title: Holy Blade
heroes.description: Gusion is a high-mobility assassin who relies on fast skill combinations and precise positioning.
